title: PayU Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: PayU Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
PayU Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PayU Digital Technologies:
PayU Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU Digital Technologies!
